import sys, os, inspect
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr import utils

print('=== File location ===')
print(utils.__file__)

print('\n=== get_spherical_cameras source ===')
try:
    src = inspect.getsource(utils.get_spherical_cameras)
    print(src)
except Exception as e:
    print('Error:', e)

print('\n=== get_ray_directions source ===')
try:
    src = inspect.getsource(utils.get_ray_directions)
    print(src)
except Exception as e:
    print('Error:', e)

print('\n=== get_rays source ===')
try:
    src = inspect.getsource(utils.get_rays)
    print(src)
except Exception as e:
    print('Error:', e)

print('\n=== get_spherical_cameras signature ===')
try:
    sig = inspect.signature(utils.get_spherical_cameras)
    print(sig)
except Exception as e:
    print('Error:', e)

print('\n=== get_ray_directions signature ===')
try:
    sig = inspect.signature(utils.get_ray_directions)
    print(sig)
except Exception as e:
    print('Error:', e)

print('\n=== get_rays signature ===')
try:
    sig = inspect.signature(utils.get_rays)
    print(sig)
except Exception as e:
    print('Error:', e)

# Try a minimal call to get_spherical_cameras with dummy args to see required format
print('\n=== Testing get_spherical_cameras with expected format ===')
import torch
try:
    # Based on git repos, maybe takes camera_to_world matrices (B,4,4) and other params
    # Try to pass a dummy 4x4 matrix
    c2w = torch.eye(4).unsqueeze(0).cuda()
    rays = utils.get_spherical_cameras(c2w, 256, 256, 40)  # guess
    print('Success with c2w shape', c2w.shape)
    print('rays_o shape:', rays[0].shape, 'rays_d shape:', rays[1].shape)
except Exception as e:
    print('Failed:', e)
